projectDescription: A Kubernetes operator that watches Secrets with specific labels and syncs their data as Vector observability pipeline configuration files to disk.
keyFeatures: Dual-role operation: Agent and Aggregator modes
Automatic config file sync from labeled Secrets to disk
TLS certificate management via labeled Secrets
Leader election support for high availability
Multi-architecture Docker image (amd64, arm64, s390x, ppc64le)
publicApiSurface: SecretReconciler — watches and reconciles v1.Secret resources
Label: logging.whizard.io/vector-role — designates Secret role (Agent or Aggregator)
Label: logging.whizard.io/enable=true — enables config reload for a Secret
Label: logging.whizard.io/certification=true — marks Secret as TLS certificate bundle
Flag: --role (Agent|Aggregator) — sets the operator's Vector role
Flag: --namespace — restricts watch to a specific namespace
Flag: --fileDir — sets output directory for generated config files
Constant: FilePath=/etc/vector/custom — default config output directory
Constant: Certification subdir — TLS certificates written here
